options.name: --openApiEndpoint
options.description:
OpenApi endpoint. If not specified, the default
'/openapi/v1.json' will be used.

options.name: --path
options.description:
Path to web app for which to check routes. If not
specified, the current directory will be used. Can be a relative or absolute
path.
